loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy — per-member breakdown is not measured for this panel aggregate; SEC and target are not measured.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing energy consumption trend for active feeders (UPS, BPDB, HHF). Rated and Contracted reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings (rated_kw, contracted_kw) are unknown.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing apparent power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) for all load feeders. Capacity (rated kVA) and peak markers are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown and no windowed-peak reducer is available.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing demand profile for UPS and BPDB feeders (has_data=Y); HHF feeders are not present on this panel's roster and will render as null.
